featureDefs.name: Tipli action yuzeyi (ham SQL yok)
featureDefs.desc: AI ajan yalniz onayli, yetkili, audit'li action'lari (publish_order, approve_invoice) cagirir; ham tabloya erisemez. Validation + yetki + side-effect + audit ickin.

featureDefs.name: MCP server per bounded context
featureDefs.desc: Her bounded context kendi MCP server'ini expose eder; modul action'lari otomatik tipli tool olur. Claude Desktop/Cursor dogrudan baglanir.

featureDefs.name: Agent capability scope kesisimi
featureDefs.desc: Erisim = user_perms ile agent_scope ile session_limits kesisimi; token/cost/tool-call butcesi + sandbox (process/container/firecracker). Privilege escalation 0 hedefi.

featureDefs.name: LLM observability + cost/quality
featureDefs.desc: Her cagri: token, latency, cost, trace, hallucination skoru; tenant/user/agent/feature bazli cost attribution. Provider-bagimsiz routing + fallback.

featureDefs.name: Agent memory + PII scrubbing
featureDefs.desc: 4 katmanli bellek (short/long/episodic/procedural); long-term decay/TTL, bellekte PII temizleme, ogrenilen prosedurde human onayi.

integration.shouldIntegrate: Evet — Layer-2 farklilastirici stack; diger stack'ler bu primitive'leri tuketir, framework AI-first iddiasinin kaynagi.
integration.kernel: Authz (agent_scope kesisimi capability ile), tenancy (memory/vector tenant-scoped RLS), event-bus (action invocation event'leri).
integration.core: Modul action'lari (Contract) otomatik tipli tool olarak yansir; her cagri audit + bitemporal.
integration.modules: sus-actions (Palantir Ontology kalitimi action disiplini), l1-search (pgvector/RAG), l1-file (OCR/parsing girdisi).
integration.apps: Tum s-* urunleri kendi MCP tool'larini publish eder; agent'lar cross-product is akisini action yuzeyinden yurutur.

moduleUsage: stack-ai: Bounded context action'lari MCP tool olarak expose edilir -> agent user_perms ile agent_scope ile session_limits kesisiminde calisir -> tool cagrisi validation + yetki + audit kapisindan gecer -> ham SQL yoktur, her etki tipli action uzerinden; cikti untrusted sayilir, dogrulamadan uretime alinmaz.
ecaExample:
trigger:
  event: ai.tool.invocation_requested
condition:
  all:
    - actor.capability >= "ai:invoke"
    - scope == intersect(user_perms, agent_scope, session_limits)
    - session.cost_remaining > 0
    - not loop_detected
action:
  - emit: ai.action.executed_via_contract
guards:
  max_depth: 6
  idempotency_key: "aitool:{invocation_id}"
  external_effects: step_up_required
securityNotes: Ham SQL erisimi YOK: AI yalniz tipli action yuzeyinden hareket eder; validation + yetki + side-effect + audit ickin uygulanir.
Capability kesisimi deny-by-default: user_perms INTERSECT agent_scope INTERSECT session_limits; hicbiri genisletemez, en dar yetki gecerli.
Session limits: token_budget / tool_calls_remaining / usd_cost zorunlu; sinir asiminda durur, sandbox (process/container/firecracker) ile izolasyon.
Bellekte PII scrubbing + forgetting; ogrenilen prosedur human onayi olmadan otomatik uygulanmaz; MCP tool ciktilari untrusted.
Moderation (toxicity/NSFW/PII detection) + anomaly/fraud; egress kontrolu ile saglayiciya yalniz onayli veri cikar.

perfNotes.code: Tool discovery latency <100ms; embedding/RAG asenkron pipeline, reindex dual_write/blue_green ile kesintisiz.
perfNotes.perf: Model routing cost-aware + fallback; streaming SSE token akisi, stream fan-out 1->N p99 <100ms; context compaction ile token tasarrufu.

testNotes: Ham SQL / tablo erisim denemesi -> reddedilmeli; yalniz action yuzeyi calismali.
user_perms disinda agent_scope genisletme -> kesisim daraltmali, escalation olmamali.
Session cost/token butcesi bitince -> tool cagrisi durmali.
Bellekte PII saklanmamali (scrub testi); untrusted tool ciktisi dogrulama kapisindan gecmeli.
